name: aquariusgirl-local-music-player
description: Aquariusgirl Music Room local music player prototype
author: Aquariusgirl

scripts.check:song-info: npm run electron:compile && npm run check:taglib-wasm-packaging && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/song-info-check.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/song-info-writer-check.mjs && node scripts/electron-selected-file-check.mjs
scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:compile && concurrently -k "npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.dist:release: npm run check:prompts && npm run check:track-display && npm run check:track-identity && npm run check:playlist-logic && npm run check:playback-order && npm run check:track-list-virtualization && npm run check:playback-restore && npm run check:metadata-save-loop && npm run check:taglib-wasm-packaging && cross-env AI_REQUIRED_RUNTIMES=darwin-arm64,win32-x64 npm run check:ai-assets && npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 && node scripts/sync-installers.mjs
scripts.dist:mac: npm run check:prompts && npm run check:track-display && npm run check:track-identity && npm run check:playlist-logic && npm run check:playback-order && npm run check:track-list-virtualization && npm run check:playback-restore && npm run check:metadata-save-loop && npm run check:taglib-wasm-packaging && cross-env AI_REQUIRED_RUNTIMES=darwin-arm64 npm run check:ai-assets && npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 && node scripts/sync-installers.mjs
scripts.dist:win: npm run check:prompts && npm run check:track-display && npm run check:track-identity && npm run check:playlist-logic && npm run check:playback-order && npm run check:track-list-virtualization && npm run check:playback-restore && npm run check:metadata-save-loop && npm run check:taglib-wasm-packaging && cross-env AI_REQUIRED_RUNTIMES=win32-x64 npm run check:ai-assets && npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 && node scripts/sync-installers.mjs
